zh.lifeSummary: 當John Eames於1642年10月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Eames24歲，母親Margaret Dean20歲。他於1682年5月11日與Elizabeth Eames在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可黑爾波恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1682年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆被列為selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs)。他去世於1733年12月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年91歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Eames于1642年10月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼迪德哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas Eames24岁，母亲Margaret Dean20岁。他于1682年5月11日与Elizabeth Eames在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可黑爾波恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1682年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆被列为selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs)。他去世于1733年12月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆享年91岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可福拉米加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Eames
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English eme, eim ‘uncle’ (Old English ēam). Most of the modern variants of the surname have post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Eames was born on 6 October 1642, in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Eames, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Dean, was 20. He married Elizabeth Eames on 11 May 1682, in Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1682, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs) in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 14 December 1733, in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 91, and was buried in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Eames est né le 6 octobre 1642, à Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Eames, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Dean, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Eames le 11 mai 1682, à Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1682, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs) à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 14 décembre 1733, à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Eames am 6. Oktober 1642 in Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Eames 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Dean 20. Er hat am 11. Mai 1682 in Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Elizabeth Eames geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1682, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs) in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Dezember 1733 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Eames è nato il il 6 ottobre 1642 nel Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Eames, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Dean, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Eames il 11 maggio 1682, nel Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1682, all'età di 40 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs) nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 14 dicembre 1733, nel Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Eamesが1642年10月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーデドハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Eamesは24歳，母Margaret Deanは20歳であった。1682年5月11日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスシェルボルンでElizabeth Eamesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1682年，40歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムでの職業はselectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs)と記録されている。彼は1733年12月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムで91歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスフラミンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Eames(이)가 1642년 10월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Eames(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Dean(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1682년 5월 11일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 셔본에서 Elizabeth Eames(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1682년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs)이었다. 그는 1733년 12월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 프램잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Eames nasceu em 6 de outubro de 1642, em Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Eames, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Dean, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Eames em 11 de maio de 1682, em Sherborn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1682, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs) em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 14 de dezembro de 1733, em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Eames родился 6 октября 1642 г. в местности дедхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Eames было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Dean, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Eames 11 мая 1682 г. в местности ширборн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1682 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs) в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 14 декабря 1733 г. в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности фрамингхам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Eames nació el 6 de octubre de 1642, en Dedham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Eames, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Dean, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Eames el 11 de mayo de 1682, en Sherborn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1682, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era selectman (in new england, one of a board of town officers elected annually to exercise executive authority in local affairs) en Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 14 de diciembre de 1733, en Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Framingham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
